User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the Clothiva application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

createdAt.description: The date and time the user was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the user was last updated.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product available for sale.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

category.description: The category the product belongs to.

stock.description: The number of units currently in stock.

createdAt.description: The date and time the product was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the product was last updated.

ShoppingCart.title: ShoppingCart
ShoppingCart.description: Represents a shopping cart for a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ShoppingCart entity.

createdAt.description: The date and time the cart was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the cart was last updated.

CartItem.title: CartItem
CartItem.description: Represents an item in a shopping cart.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CartItem entity.

quantity.description: The quantity of the product in the cart item.

createdAt.description: The date and time the cart item was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the cart item was last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents an order placed by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

orderDate.description: The date the order was placed.

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the order.

status.description: The status of the order (Pending, Paid, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled).

shippingAddress.description: The shipping address for the order.

createdAt.description: The date and time the order was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the order was last updated.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents an item within an order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

quantity.description: The quantity of the product in the order item.

price.description: The price of the product at the time of the order.

createdAt.description: The date and time the order item was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the order item was last updated.

Inquiry.title: Inquiry
Inquiry.description: Represents a newsletter subscription from the footer form.

submittedAt.description: The date and time the inquiry was submitted.

definition.description: Stores user profiles.  Path-based ownership ensures that only the authenticated user can access their own profile data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores product information. Publicly readable, but create/update operations are restricted to admins.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier of the product.

definition.description: Stores shopping cart information for each user.  Only the user can access their own shopping cart.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: shoppingCartId
params.description: The unique identifier of the shopping cart.

definition.description: Stores cart items for each shopping cart.  Only the user can access their own cart items.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: shoppingCartId
params.description: The unique identifier of the shopping cart.

params.name: cartItemId
params.description: The unique identifier of the cart item.

definition.description: Stores order information for each user. Only the user and admins can access order data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the order.

definition.description: Stores order items for each order. Only the user and admins can access order item data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the order.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: The unique identifier of the order item.

definition.description: Stores newsletter subscriptions and inquiries. Publicly writable for new submissions.

params.name: inquiryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the inquiry.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to support the Clothiva application's core features, including user authentication, product management, shopping cart, checkout, and order management. It prioritizes security, scalability, and debuggability by adhering to the principles of Authorization Independence, Clarity of Intent, DBAC (Database Authentication and Authorization Control), and QAPs (Rules are not Filters). Authorization Independence is achieved through denormalization where necessary, avoiding `get()` calls in security rules. Structural Segregation ensures that collections have homogeneous security postures.  Access Modeling follows consistent patterns, using path-based ownership for user-specific data and the membership map model for collaborative data. 

The `/users/{userId}` collection stores user profiles. Path-based ownership ensures that only the authenticated user can access their own profile data. Products are stored in the `/products/{productId}` collection. Shopping carts, cart items, orders, and order items are structured under the user's document, ensuring that data is scoped to the user and that security rules can be easily applied. This structure supports the required QAPs by enabling secure `list` operations, as access to subcollections is controlled by the parent user document.  No `get()` calls are required in rules, and role-based access is determined by the user's authentication status, simplifying the security rules.
